dialogueChunks.intro: The original disaster around {quest_focus_the} triggered a chain reaction. The {enemy_type} have moved into the destabilized area near {location_hint}, and conditions are deteriorating.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} warns that {quest_threat_the} {quest_threat_is} compounding: each problem feeds the next. The {enemy_type} are exploiting the chaos, raiding supply caches that were left exposed. We need those supplies recovered and the hostiles driven out.
dialogueChunks.outro: Stabilize the situation before it spirals further. Clear the area, recover what was lost, and buy us time to fix what {quest_stakes_the} need most.

dialogueChunks.intro: While the crisis around {quest_focus_the} worsens, the settlement has descended into finger-pointing. People want someone to blame more than they want solutions.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} is taking most of the heat, deserved or not. Meanwhile, {quest_ally} is struggling to organize repairs because everyone is too busy arguing about whose fault {quest_threat_the} {quest_threat_was}. The {enemy_type} don't care about blame: they're raiding near {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.outro: Ignore the politics and handle the practical problem. Fight back {quest_threat_the}, gather what's needed, and let results speak louder than accusations.

dialogueChunks.intro: As if {quest_focus_the} wasn't enough, the instability has caused a second incident near {location_hint}. The ground is weakened and the area is swarming with displaced {enemy_type}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} says the second site is connected to the first: the same recklessness that created {quest_threat_the} destabilized the whole region. {target_npc} needs materials from both sites to reinforce what's left. {quest_stakes_The} can't take another hit.
dialogueChunks.outro: Go to the secondary site near {location_hint}. Clear it, gather what {target_npc} needs, and make sure we don't lose anything else.
